metadata.name: QF-IDS CICIDS-format Dataset

attack_classes.name: PortScan

metadata.note: Generated to match CICIDS-2017 feature schema and attack-class characteristics documented in the original paper. To use the actual published CICIDS-2017 CSVs, convert them to this JSON format using `tools/convert_cicids.py`.
